Values: WW. Refer to online calendar for surveillance week date periods

Description: Date of the last day of the surveillance week. Surveillance weeks run from Sunday to Saturday.

Values:
YYYYWW (Six digit code for year and epiweek. The first 4 digits is 
the year and last two digit is the week number. For 
example: 202535 or 202602)
